opportunities.title: [HIRING] India Only – Client Finder / Lead Generator for Website Development (30% Commission)
opportunities.description:
[HIRING] India Only – Client Finder / Lead Generator for Website Development (30% Commission)

Hi everyone, I'm a web developer specializing in: • HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript • React & modern frontend development • Mobile-friendly websites • SEO optimization • Performance optimization I'm looking for someone who can help me find clients who need website development services. Commission Structure 💰 You will receive 30% of the total project value for every client you bring who successfully places an order. What I Build ✅ Business websites ✅ Portfolio websites ✅ Landing pages ✅ Service websites ✅
